goals.title: Public OBA agent repo only. Fix EXAONE tag protocol per user decision...
goals.objective: Public OBA agent repo only. Fix EXAONE tag protocol per user decision: human input a goes to EXAONE input layer as one content containing only [user]a[/user]; EXAONE emits the main-agent request as [agent]...[/agent]; the main agent receives only extracted text with no tags; main output b goes to EXAONE final layer as one content containing only [agent]b[/agent]; EXAONE final emits the human-facing answer. Do not mix [user] and [agent] in one EXAONE user message. Keep input translation conservative for simple greetings and avoid meta instructions such as '메인 에이전트에게 전달할 요청'. Add guard/fallback so EXAONE final cannot add dates, news, weather, execution claims, or other facts absent from main-agent output. Fix debug so EXAONE User Input/Output, Main Input/Output, Tool Calls, and EXAONE Final Input/Output are visible and main input is not n/a. Add regression tests, run real HTTP manual QA with curl, run full local checks, commit and push public repo. Do not edit private repo.

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: run a scripted /turn for message '안녕' where EXAONE input returns [agent]안녕[/agent] and main returns '안녕하세요!'. Capture curl status/body proving EXAONE input request content contains only [user]안녕[/user] with no [agent], main input is exactly '안녕', EXAONE final request content contains only [agent]안녕하세요![/agent] with no [user], and debug Main Input is structured, not n/a.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-C001-tag-protocol-http.txt: HTTP/1.1 200 OK; validation c001 PASS; proved EXAONE input only [user], final only [agent], mainAgentInput='안녕', structured debug.mainAgent.input.messages | cleanup: killed temp server pid per artifact; removed temp port/raw/body files; removed temp QA script

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call: run scripted /turn for message '안녕' where EXAONE input over-expands into a meta request and EXAONE final fabricates date/news/weather. Capture curl status/body proving mainAgentInput falls back to original '안녕', fallback reason is recorded, final answer falls back to main-agent output, and no unsupported date/news/weather facts are delivered.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-C002-guardrails-http.txt: HTTP/1.1 200 OK; validation c002 PASS; proved over-expanded translation fallback and unsupported volatile final fallback, raw EXAONE still visible in debug | cleanup: killed temp server pid per artifact; removed temp port/raw/body files; removed temp QA script

successCriteria.scenario: HTTP call plus local checks: run the existing local file read -> ggui_render_surface scripted /turn without user mentioning ggui, and run targeted/full tests. Capture curl status/body proving read and ggui tool calls still execute through main agent, EXAONE receives no tools, and debug panes expose tool calls after protocol changes.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/G001-C003-tool-ggui-regression.txt: HTTP/1.1 200 OK; validation c003 PASS; proved read,ggui_render_surface tool calls, one ggui attachment, EXAONE request no tools, structured debug | cleanup: killed temp server pid per artifact; removed temp port/raw/body files; removed temp QA script

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019e799c-c85f-7a22-a868-75f6a58d1939/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019e799c-c85f-7a22-a868-75f6a58d1939/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
